title: Unable to "Dev Containers: Rebuild and Reopen in Container" for Podman in VSCode
body:
### Issue Description

Version 5.2.2 of Podman and latest VSCode version (1.93.0).
Windows Version: Windows 11 Home 23H2

Whenever I try to open my VSCode project in podman container using dev containers extension, I get an error saying: 

`COPY --from=dev_containers_feature_content_source devcontainer-features.builtin.env /tmp/build-features/
Error: building at STEP "COPY --from=dev_containers_feature_content_source devcontainer-features.builtin.env /tmp/build-features/": checking on sources under "/home/user/C:\\Users\\rishi\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\devcontainercli\\container-features\\0.69.0-1725677525087": error in copier subprocess: changing to intended-new-root directory "/home/user/C:\\Users\\rishi\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\devcontainercli\\container-features\\0.69.0-1725677525087": chdir /home/user/C:\Users\rishi\AppData\Local\Temp\devcontainercli\container-features\0.69.0-1725677525087: no such file or directory`

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. In VS Code add extension: Dev Containers
2. In Dev Container settings, change "Dev Container: Docker Path" to `podman`
3. Find and run command: `Dev Containers: Reopen in Container`
4. Crashes :)
[remoteContainers-2024-09-07T03-07-21.811Z.log](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/16914145/remoteContainers-2024-09-07T03-07-21.811Z.log)


### Describe the results you received

Crashes, doesn't load into podman machine.

### Describe the results you expected

I would hope that the project reopens in a new container running podman machine.

### podman info output

```yaml
[1/2] STEP 1/4: FROM ghcr.io/ut-ras/robomaster-firmware:45e7eec2b18933ef7caa7a46087c2d9ce1c36081 AS dev_containers_feature_content_normalize
[1/2] STEP 2/4: USER root
--> Using cache d761e7fbc51b35f292286c040c2dd4b6ae6894a8153f3f76aac377b8f85c14d1
--> d761e7fbc51b
[1/2] STEP 3/4: COPY --from=dev_containers_feature_content_source devcontainer-features.builtin.env /tmp/build-features/
Error: building at STEP "COPY --from=dev_containers_feature_content_source devcontainer-features.builtin.env /tmp/build-features/": checking on sources under "/home/user/C:\\Users\\rishi\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\devcontainercli\\container-features\\0.69.0-1725677525087": error in copier subprocess: changing to intended-new-root directory "/home/user/C:\\Users\\rishi\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\devcontainercli\\container-features\\0.69.0-1725677525087": chdir /home/user/C:\Users\rishi\AppData\Local\Temp\devcontainercli\container-features\0.69.0-1725677525087: no such file or directory
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_
